## 📝 Description
**Type of Change:**
- [ ] 🤖 Machine Learning / Model Update
- [ ] 🛠️ Data Engineering / Pipeline
- [ ] 🎨 Frontend / UI
- [ ] 🧪 Tests / Documentation
- [ ] 🐞 Bug Fix

---

## 📊 RecSys Impact (For ML Changes)
- **Metric Improved:** (e.g., Recall@10, NDCG, Latency)
- **Baseline Result:** - **New Result:** - **Dataset Used:** (e.g., MovieLens-100k, Synthetic)

## 🧪 Testing Checklist
- [ ] **Unit Tests:** All tests passed (Run `pytest` and `vitest`).
- [ ] **Linting:** Code follows project style (Run `ruff` / `eslint`).
- [ ] **Integration:** Frontend successfully fetches data from the API.
- [ ] **Environment:** New dependencies added to `requirements.txt` or `package.json`.

---

## 🔗 Related Issues
Fixes # (issue number)

## 🏁 Final Checks
- [ ] My code follows the professional structure of this repo.
- [ ] I have updated the README if necessary.
- [ ] I have verified that no sensitive data (API keys, raw user data) is being committed.
